episodes.title: My Kids Thought I Was the Devil Because of a Cult | Peter Young
episodes.description:
What if everything you believed was a lie?

In this powerful episode of In The House Podcast, Peter Young shares his unbelievable true story of unknowingly spending nearly 20 years inside a destructive religious cult.

What started as a relationship with the woman he loved slowly turned into a nightmare of manipulation, mind control, isolation, and family destruction. Peter reveals how a charismatic cult leader gained control over his wife, influenced his children, and eventually convinced them that Peter was the enemy.

We discuss:
🔹 How people get pulled into cults without realizing it
 🔹 The psychology of manipulation and brainwashing
 🔹 Warning signs of cult behavior
 🔹 Family separation and parental alienation
 🔹 Faith, recovery, and rebuilding life after trauma
 🔹 Why cults still exist in modern society
 🔹 How to protect yourself and your loved ones

Peter's story is heartbreaking, eye-opening, and ultimately inspiring.

If you've ever wondered how ordinary people become trapped in extraordinary situations, this conversation is a must-watch.

👇 Let us know in the comments: Could you recognize the warning signs of a cult?
#InTheHousePodcast

📚 Guest: Peter Young
Book: Stop The Tall Man, Save The Tiger

🎙️ Subscribe for more conversations with fascinating people, life-changing stories, and thought-provoking discussions.

#WeInTheHouse
